title: Savory Portuguese Cheese Lasagna
description: A rich and adventurous Portuguese dish featuring lemon zest and shio cure, this lasagna is perfect for those looking for a low sodium and flavorful meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the spinach to the skillet and cook until wilted.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, portuguese cheese, shio cure, and lemon zest, and mix well.
Stir the cooked spinach and garlic into the cheese mixture.
Spread a layer of the cheese mixture in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the cheese layer.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
